name: Kingclean Electric Co.Ltd
summary: Kingclean Electric Co.Ltd manufactures and sells high-speed and automobile motors, cleaning and kitchen appliances, and garden tool products in the People's Republic of China. Its products include vacuum cleaners, high pressure washers, motors, car motors, hard floor polishers, and carpet washers, as well as small home appliances, such as food cooking machines, juicers, and soymilk makers. The company also exports its products. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Suzhou, the People's Republic of China.
